mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_supplier_pool WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND is_disabled = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_monthly_assessment WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND year_month = #{yearMonth}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_monthly_assessment WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'LOCKED' AND year_month = #{yearMonth}

SELECT department, COUNT(*) as score_count, COALESCE(AVG(dimension_score), 0) as avg_score FROM sp_department_score WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND year_month = #{yearMonth} GROUP BY department ORDER BY department

SELECT sp.category, COUNT(DISTINCT sp.id) as supplier_count, COALESCE(AVG(ma.total_score), 0) as avg_score, SUM(CASE WHEN ma.grade = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as grade_a_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ma.grade = 'D' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as grade_d_count FROM sp_supplier_pool sp LEFT JOIN sp_monthly_assessment ma ON sp.name = ma.supplier_name AND ma.year_month = #{yearMonth} WHERE sp.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY sp.category ORDER BY sp.category
